hub_subtitle: Inglês para Trabalho Remoto em Tecnologia & Quality Assurance

lesson.menu_title: Who Is Ana? -- Introducing Your Work in QA & Tech
lesson.menu_desc: Introducing yourself and your work in QA to an international team -- 32 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 1 -- Who Is Ana?
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Ana Claudia Veraldi | Lesson 1 -- Who Is Ana?

listenings.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to today's stand-up. Thanks for joining from so many different countries. Before we start, a quick reminder: we have a release on Friday, so the QA team needs to finish testing the new payment feature by Thursday. If you find any critical bugs, please report them right away and tag me. I know some of you are working remotely across different time zones, so let's keep our updates short and clear. Okay, let's go around the team. Who would like to start?

Hi Ana, this is Mark Feldman calling from TechNova. Thanks again for your application for the Senior QA Analyst position. I have reviewed your profile, and I am really impressed. Six years in quality assurance is exactly what we are looking for. I would like to invite you to a video interview next Tuesday at three in the afternoon, your time. The role is fully remote, so you can work from São Paulo. Please reply to my email to confirm. I am looking forward to speaking with you. Take care.

extra_audio.text: First, Ana introduces herself: her name, her role, and her company. Then she explains how long she has worked in quality assurance. Next, Mark asks about her work with software and testing. After that, Ana describes what she is working on right now. Finally, they agree to schedule a video interview and follow up by email.
